OpenAQ Python SDK
GitHub

OpenAQ Python SDK

Reference and learning resources for using the OpenAQ API with Python!
Get started

Key Features

Section titled “Key Features”
 Helpers

Helpful built-in features like automatic rate-limiting, expressive error handling and more.

 Async-ready

Provides both synchronous and asynchronous clients, so you can choose the right approach for your use case

 Intuitive Access

Converts API responses to Python objects for easier, more intuitive data access. Work with familiar object attributes instead of dictionary syntax

 Type annotations

Fully typed for excellent autocomplete, inline documentation, and catch errors before runtime
